title: DeepSeek 新模型重要的三个原因
content: 周五，中国人工智能公司 DeepSeek 发布了其期待已久的新旗舰机型 V4 的预览。值得注意的是，由于新设计有助于更有效地处理大量文本，该模型可以处理比上一代更长的提示。与 DeepSeek 之前的型号一样，V4 是 o
original_title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
original_content: On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. Notably, the model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. title: 没有什么介绍人工智能驱动的听写工具
content: Nothing 是新的设备听写工具，支持 100 多种语言。
original_title: Nothing introduces an AI-powered dictation tool
original_content: Nothing's new on-device dictation tool supports over 100 languages.

title: 苹果下一任首席执行官需要推出杀手级人工智能产品
content: 蒂姆·库克是一位伟大的首席执行官，但他并没有破解人工智能。  这是约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 的首要工作。
original_title: Apple's Next CEO Needs to Launch a Killer AI Product
original_content: Tim Cook was a great CEO, but he didn’t crack AI.  It’s job number 1 for John Ternus.

title: 谷歌将以现金和计算方式向 Anthropic 投资高达 40B 美元
content: 谷歌计划向 Anthropic 投资高达 400 亿美元，因为人工智能竞争对手在其强大的、专注于网络安全的 Mythos 模型有限发布后，竞相争夺巨大的计算能力。
original_title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
original_content: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.
